time.title: Time Display
time.description: Choose how timestamps are formatted in chat messages.
time.localDescription: When enabled, timestamps are displayed in your local timezone. When disabled, times are shown in UTC.

date.title: Date Display
date.description: Choose how dates appear throughout the app.

number.title: Number Format
number.description: Choose the thousands separator and decimal mark.

audio.activationModeHint: Choose how your microphone is activated.
audio.pttHint: Configure the Push to Talk key under the {{tab}} tab.
audio.noiseSuppressionHint: Reduces background noise before your voice reaches listeners.
audio.autoGainHint: Automatically adjusts microphone volume for consistent levels.
audio.maxAmplificationHint: Maximum boost the auto-gain controller can apply. Auto-calibration accounts for this when picking the threshold.
audio.qualityHint: Higher bitrate means better audio quality but more bandwidth.
audio.audioPerPacketHint: Smaller values reduce latency; larger values are more bandwidth-efficient.
audio.forceTcpAudioHint: Always send audio over the TCP tunnel instead of UDP. Use this if you are behind a strict firewall or NAT that blocks UDP traffic.
audio.legacyAudioBackendHint: Switch to the legacy cpal audio backend. Use this if you experience issues with the default rodio backend. Takes effect on the next voice toggle.

stats.title: Audio Statistics
stats.noStats: No statistics available. Connect to a server to see packet statistics.
stats.udpCounters: UDP packet counters since connection start.

denoiser.offDesc: No noise processing. Raw microphone audio is transmitted as-is.
denoiser.rnnoiseDesc: Neural network trained on real speech. Works well in most environments.
denoiser.deepfilternetDesc: State-of-the-art deep learning. Best quality; higher CPU cost.
denoiser.omlsaDesc: Modern classical estimator. Very smooth suppression output.
denoiser.spectralDesc: Lightest option. Ideal for steady background noise.

voice.vadThresholdHint: Audio below this level is suppressed to filter background noise.
voice.noiseGateCloseHint: Close threshold as a fraction of the open threshold. Lower = more aggressive gating.
voice.holdFramesHint: Frames to keep the gate open after voice drops below threshold.
voice.pushToTalkHint: Hold a key to transmit instead of voice activation.

advanced.expertModeHintNormal: Streamlined - we handle the technical details for you.
advanced.expertModeHintExpert: Full control - advanced audio options, custom ports and labels are visible.
advanced.klipyApiKeyHintAfter: API key for GIF/sticker search. Leave empty to use the built-in key.
advanced.developerModeHint: Show debug statistics (message counts, offloaded content, memory usage) in the server info panel.
advanced.logLevelHint: Set the verbosity of Rust backend logging. Lower levels include all messages from higher levels. Changes take effect immediately.
advanced.translationHelperHint: Open a popout window that lets you add or improve a UI translation. Pick a language, click any text in the main window to find its key, and edit, save or export the resulting JSON bundle.
advanced.autoReconnectHint: Automatically retry connecting if the server connection drops unexpectedly. Manual disconnects never trigger auto-reconnect.
advanced.autoUpdateHint: When enabled, available updates are downloaded and installed automatically when Fancy Mumble starts. A small progress window appears during the download. When disabled, you will be asked before each update.
advanced.persistDmsHint: Direct messages exchanged with friends are saved on this device, encrypted with AES-GCM. Turn off to keep DMs in memory only; existing history is removed when you disable this.
advanced.dangerZoneHint: Delete all saved data - servers, preferences, and certificates - and return to the welcome screen.
advanced.dangerConfirmText: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

shortcuts.globalHint: Shortcuts marked global work even when the app is in the background. In-app shortcuts only fire while the window is focused.
shortcuts.builtinHint: These shortcuts are always active inside the message composer.

userShortcuts.title: Jump to user (cross-server)
userShortcuts.hint: Bind a global hotkey to a specific person. Users are identified solely by their certificate hash, so when you press the hotkey the app finds them on whichever server you are currently connected to and opens the direct message.
userShortcuts.pickUser: Pick a user from the active server
userShortcuts.noActiveServer: Connect to a server first to pick a user.
userShortcuts.noUsersOnline: No other users with a certificate hash are visible on this server.
userShortcuts.noHashExplain: Users with a certificate match on every server you join. Users without one stay tied to the current server.

identities.description: Identities are TLS client certificates used to authenticate with Mumble servers. Each identity is unique to you and persists across sessions.
identities.noIdentities: No identities yet. Create or import one below.

notifications.soundsHint: Play a sound when events occur. Individual events can be configured below.
notifications.nativeHint: Show native OS notifications for new messages when the app is in the background.
notifications.evtChatMessageDesc: A new message in a channel you are viewing
notifications.evtDirectMessageDesc: A new private or group message
notifications.evtMentionDesc: Someone mentioned you with @, @everyone, @here, or your role
notifications.evtUserJoinChannelDesc: Someone moved into your current channel
notifications.evtUserLeaveChannelDesc: Someone moved out of your current channel
notifications.evtStreamStartDesc: A user started sharing their screen
notifications.evtVoiceActivityDesc: Someone started speaking in your channel
notifications.evtSelfMutedDesc: You muted or unmuted your microphone

privacy.dualPathHint: When enabled, encrypted channels also send a plain-text placeholder over the normal message path so legacy clients without E2EE support see "[Encrypted message]" instead of nothing. Disable this to keep the ciphertext off the unencrypted path entirely.
privacy.dualPathWarningActivePara: A plaintext placeholder is sent over the unencrypted message path. Anyone monitoring TCP traffic can see when an encrypted message was sent, even if they cannot read its contents. Only enable this for compatibility with legacy clients that lack E2EE support.
privacy.readReceiptsHint: When enabled, other users will not see that you have read their messages. You will also not see read receipts from others.
privacy.readReceiptsWarning: Read times are visible to others
privacy.readReceiptsWarningPara: Other users can see exactly when you opened a message. Enable this toggle to stop broadcasting your read times.
privacy.typingIndicatorsHint: When enabled, you will not send typing indicators to others and you will not see when others are typing.
privacy.osmMapsHint: When enabled, no map tiles are loaded and no IP geolocation requests are sent to external services.
privacy.osmMapsWarningPara: Map tiles are fetched from tile.openstreetmap.org. Your IP address is visible to OpenStreetMap servers on every map interaction. Enable this toggle to prevent those requests.
privacy.linkPreviewsHint: When enabled, the app will not request link metadata from the server. This prevents the server from learning which URLs you share in chat.
privacy.linkPreviewsWarning: URLs are sent to the server for preview generation
privacy.linkPreviewsWarningPara: Every link you paste in chat is fetched by the server to generate a preview. This lets the server log all URLs you share and may hint at encrypted message content if a URL carries context. Enable this toggle to prevent it.
privacy.externalEmbedsHint: Required for the YouTube watch-together adapter. When enabled, the YouTube IFrame API is loaded from youtube.com on demand. Disable to keep all watch-together sessions on direct media URLs only.
privacy.externalEmbedsWarningPara: YouTube's IFrame API is fetched from youtube.com during watch-together sessions. Google can observe these requests and associate them with your IP address.
privacy.streamerModeHint: Hides identifying information (server host, ports, IP addresses, geolocation) and suppresses native notifications so they cannot leak personal data into a screen recording.

personalize.themeHint: Choose the visual style for the entire app.
personalize.chatBgHint: Set a custom background image for your chat view.
personalize.bgDropLabel: Drop a background image here or click to browse
personalize.blurStrengthHint: Higher values produce a stronger blur.
personalize.imageOpacityHint: How visible the background image is.
personalize.dimOverlayHint: Darkens the background to improve text readability.
personalize.messageStyleHint: Choose how chat messages are displayed.
personalize.customFontSizeHint: Override font size with an exact pixel value.
personalize.compactModeHint: Hide avatars and tighten spacing for higher density.
personalize.alwaysShowMessageActionsHint: Pin the copy, reply and reaction buttons below every text message instead of revealing them on hover.
personalize.channelViewerHint: Choose how the channel list is displayed in the sidebar.

activation.voiceDesc: Transmits while you talk. The mic opens when audio crosses the threshold and closes when it drops back below.
activation.continuousDesc: Always transmits. Best when you are alone in a quiet room or want zero clipping at the start of words.
activation.pttDesc: Transmits only while a hotkey is held. Set the key under the Shortcuts tab.

calibration.autoModeDesc: Start the test and speak normally for ~5 seconds, pausing as you would in a real conversation. Threshold, hysteresis and hold time tune themselves and ignore silent gaps.
calibration.manualModeDesc: Drag the green Open and orange Close triangles directly on the meter. The bar lights up green when you would currently be transmitting.
calibration.needsCalibrationPara: Click Calibrate and speak naturally for 5 seconds so the gate can tune itself to your microphone.
calibration.manualHintMid: triangle to where speech reaches and the
calibration.manualHintPost: triangle below it for a buffer that prevents chatter. The meter turns green when audio is loud enough to transmit.
calibration.belowThreshold: Below threshold - the gate is closed.
calibration.pressTestMic: Press Test Mic to preview the gate.
calibration.holdFramesHint: Frames (~20 ms each) to keep the gate open after audio drops below the close handle. Stops word endings from being clipped.
calibration.hearYourselfHint: Record up to {{seconds}} s of speech through the same filters your listeners receive - AGC, noise suppression and the gate - then plays it back so you can verify how you sound in a real call.

profile.viewingOtherIdentity: Viewing profile for a different identity. Changes are saved locally but will not be applied to the server until you connect with this identity.
profile.usernameHint: Pre-filled when you add a new server.
profile.avatarHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, GIF, or pick from Klipy. Sent as the Mumble user texture.
profile.bannerHint: Background colour, image, or GIF for your profile card banner.
profile.bioHint: Visible to other Mumble clients as your user comment.
profile.statusHint: A short status message shown below your name.
profile.cardBgHint: Pick up to 5 colours. The first 3 form the gradient, the 4th sets the border, and the 5th becomes an accent for status text.
profile.avatarBorderHint: Border style around your profile picture.
profile.decorationHint: An overlay around your avatar frame.
profile.nameplateHint: Background style behind your display name.
profile.effectHint: Animated effect shown on your profile card.

avatarEditor.title: Edit Avatar
avatarEditor.dropLabel: Drop an image or GIF here, or click to browse
avatarEditor.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes. Apply or discard them.

bannerEditor.title: Edit Banner
bannerEditor.dropLabel: Drop an image or GIF here, or click to browse
bannerEditor.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes. Apply or discard them.

denoiserAdvanced.hint: Fine-tune the selected denoiser. Defaults are tuned for everyday voice chat; only adjust these if the result sounds wrong on your hardware.

nameStyle.heading: Name Style
nameStyle.hint: Customise how your name is rendered for FancyMumble users.

banList.title: Ban List
banList.selectEntry: Select a ban entry to edit

channelAcl.title: Channel ACL Editor
channelAcl.selectChannel: Select a channel to edit its ACL

roles.title: Server Roles
roles.description: Server-wide roles live on the root channel and are inherited everywhere. Use the Channel ACL tab to add per-channel overrides.

roleDisplay.iconPickerErrorProcess: Could not process the cropped image.

emotes.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage custom server emotes.
emotes.errorRequiredFields: Shortcode and alias emoji are required.

roleManagerDialog.title: Manage roles for {{name}}
roleManagerDialog.noRoles: No roles defined on this server.

rolePermissions.description: Permissions are stored as ACL rules on the channel. Toggling a permission creates or updates an "apply here" rule that targets the {{role}} role.

roleMembers.excludedDesc: Users who should be removed from the inherited member set.
roleMembers.allowChildInherit: Allow child channels to inherit from this role
roleMembers.addUserPlaceholder: Add user by name or ID

WRITE.title: Write ACL
WRITE.description: Edit the channel ACL and groups.

TRAVERSE.title: Traverse
TRAVERSE.description: See the channel and walk into its sub-channels.

MUTE_DEAFEN.title: Mute / Deafen others
MUTE_DEAFEN.description: Server-mute or server-deafen other users in this channel.

MOVE.title: Move users
MOVE.description: Move other users into or out of this channel.

LINK_CHANNEL.title: Link channels
LINK_CHANNEL.description: Link this channel to other channels for cross-talk.

WHISPER.title: Whisper
WHISPER.description: Send targeted whispers into this channel.

TEXT_MESSAGE.title: Send text messages
TEXT_MESSAGE.description: Post text messages in the channel chat.

MAKE_TEMP_CHANNEL.title: Make temporary sub-channel
MAKE_TEMP_CHANNEL.description: Create temporary sub-channels that vanish when empty.

LISTEN.title: Listen
LISTEN.description: Receive audio from this channel without joining it.

DELETE_MESSAGE.title: Delete messages
DELETE_MESSAGE.description: Delete other users' messages in the channel.

SUBSCRIBE_PUSH.title: Subscribe to push
SUBSCRIBE_PUSH.description: Receive push notifications from the channel.

SHARE_FILES_PUBLIC.title: Share files (public)
SHARE_FILES_PUBLIC.description: Share files publicly in the channel.

REGISTER.title: Register users
REGISTER.description: Register guest users into the server database.

RESET_USER_CONTENT.title: Reset user content
RESET_USER_CONTENT.description: Wipe avatars, comments and other content from a user.

KEY_OWNER.title: Key owner
KEY_OWNER.description: Marks the user as a key owner for the persistent-chat key share workflow.

channelsAndRoles.heading: Channels & Roles
channelsAndRoles.unsupportedServer: The connected server does not support the onboarding workflow. It requires a Fancy Mumble server running 0.3.1 or newer.
channelsAndRoles.notEnabled: This server does not have onboarding enabled.
channelsAndRoles.subtitle: These come from the answers you gave when you joined. Update them any time to change which channels and roles apply to you.

admin.heading: Onboarding
admin.unsupportedServer: The connected server does not support the onboarding workflow. It requires a Fancy Mumble server running 0.3.1 or newer.
admin.description: Show new members a welcome questionnaire that maps their answers to channels and Mumble ACL groups.

modal.welcomeSubtitle: Let's tailor your view of this server.
modal.defaultChannelsEmpty: You'll start with the full channel list. Answer the next questions to narrow it down.

serverPlugins.title: Server Plugins
serverPlugins.empty: No plugins installed on the server.
serverPlugins.loadTimeout: No response from server. The server may not support the plugin admin API.
serverPlugins.unsupported: This feature requires Fancy Mumble server version 0.4.0 or later.
serverPlugins.reloadTitle: Reload the plugin to apply configuration changes without restarting the server.
serverPlugins.confirmUninstall: Uninstall plugin "{{name}}"? This removes it from the server.

marketplace.title: Plugin Marketplace
marketplace.missingManifestUrl: Plugin is missing a manifest URL.
marketplace.installUnsupported: Installing plugins requires Fancy Mumble server version 0.4.0 or later.
marketplace.connectToInstall: Connect to a server with admin rights to install this plugin.
marketplace.openInStoreTitle: Open this plugin's page in your browser

plugins.empty: No plugins are loaded on the connected server.
plugins.revokeTrustTitle: Forget this decision so the trust prompt re-appears
plugins.repromptTitle: Clear this decision so the trust prompt re-appears next time the server broadcasts the plugin

pluginTrust.title: Server wants to enable plugin
pluginTrust.repromptWarning: This plugin's version or capability set changed since you last reviewed it. Re-confirm before re-enabling.
pluginTrust.abilitySection: This plugin will be able to
